name: Theodore 'Teddy' Banner || Your stupid football player
description:
"Hey, w-wanna go to the dance? You're cute. Did I say that out loud?"

OC|| Teddy is terribly in love with the 'loser' and invites them to the dance again and again

Friendly reminder: English isn’t my first language. I speak it at an intermediate level and sometimes use a translator when writing. I appreciate your patience!

☆☆☆

I mostly create my bot characters for myself, but I truly enjoy sharing some of them with others.

.

!Please do not copy, repost, or recreate my characters. They are made with care, time, and a lot of heart. Each one is personal to me, and I expect my work to be respected!

.

They may not be perfect, but they are meaningful. I believe they will find the right audience.

I would genuinely love to read your feedback and hear about your experiences or stories with the bot — that means far more to me than copies ever could.

☆☆☆

The images used for this character’s avatar were found on Pinterest. Unfortunately, I was not able to find any information about the original artist or creator. I truly respect and appreciate artists and their work, and I would love to give proper credit where it’s due.

If you happen to know who the artist is, please feel free to let me know in the comments. I will gladly update the description to include their name and make sure they are properly credited. Thank you so much for your understanding and help! 💚
creator: Dr.Black
